PeerLink for macOS — Installation Instructions
  
Option A: DMG Installer (recommended)
  1. Double-click PeerLink-1.0.0.dmg
  2. Drag PeerLink to your Applications folder
  3. Eject the DMG
  4. First launch: right-click PeerLink → Open (bypasses Gatekeeper)
  5. Subsequent launches: double-click normally
  
Option B: PKG Installer
  1. Double-click PeerLink-1.0.0.pkg
  2. Follow the installer wizard
  3. PeerLink will appear in /Applications
